name: 1Panel
desc: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

name: clawvisor
desc: API gateway for purpose-based authorization for AI agents. Human approval for tasks, AI-native enforcement for agents.

name: pydantic-ai
desc: AI Agent Framework, the Pydantic way

name: notebooklm-py
desc: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

name: swarmauri-sdk
desc: Modular Python SDK and monorepo for AI agents, LLM integrations, tools, parsers, embeddings, vector stores, and extensible application workflows.

name: Friday
desc: The trusted application layer for AI agents to do real work.

name: rsclaw
desc: 🦀 AI Agent Engine with Long-Term Memory and Self-Learning & One-Click OpenClaw Migration

name: ClawBench
desc: Open-source benchmark for browser AI agents on 153 everyday online tasks across 144 live websites. 5-layer recording + DOM-match + LLM judge. Top score 33.3%.

name: AI-Build-AI
desc: AIBuildAI – An AI agent that automatically builds AI models (#1 on OpenAI MLE-Bench)

name: microsandbox
desc: 🧱 secure, local and programmable sandboxes for AI agents
